message:
fix: Correct test expectations in color and terminal_session

- Fix rgb_to_ansi16_basics test: pure blue (0,0,255) is mathematically
  closer to Blue(0,0,238) than BrightBlue(92,92,255) due to weighted
  distance formula penalizing the red/green components
- Fix SessionOptions doctest to use ..Default::default() pattern
  to accommodate new kitty_keyboard field

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
